md.name: Managing Director
md.description: Top-level orchestrator. Parses briefs, selects engagement config, assigns tasks via Task Objects, enforces all quality gates.

ep.name: Engagement Partner
ep.description: Senior strategic reviewer. Challenges direction at Gate H, Gate D, and G2. Produces EP Review Memo with Pass/Conditional/Rework verdict.

em.name: Engagement Manager
em.description: PM, synthesis lead, narrative owner. Assembles Tier 3+4 outputs into client narrative using the Strategic Insight Memo as spine.

eda.name: Engagement Design Agent
eda.description: Designs every engagement: Methodology Brief, Approach Document, and Engagement Hypothesis. Runs after KM retrieval; feeds Gate H.

wsl.name: Workshop & Stakeholder Lead
wsl.description: Designs co-creation workshop packs: facilitator guides, participant workbooks, and structured output capture templates as .pptx.

sr.name: Senior Researcher
sr.description: General external intelligence engine. Market sizing, trend analysis, best-practice scanning. Produces structured Research Notes.

sa.name: Sector Agent
sa.description: Deep sector specialist configurable at intake. Produces Sector Intelligence Brief; benchmarks client against sector peers.

ci.name: Competitive Intelligence Agent
ci.description: Competitor mapping and benchmarking. Profiles top 3-5 competitors across strategy, digital maturity, AI adoption, and market position.

rc.name: Regulatory & Compliance Agent
rc.description: Regulatory landscape specialist. EU AI Act, GDPR, sectoral regulation. Compliance Calendar. Mandatory caveat on every output.

fa.name: Financial Analyst Agent
fa.description: Business cases, NPV, ROI, sensitivity analysis in Python/openpyxl. All arithmetic in code. Conservative bias; hard/soft benefit separation.

oma.name: Operating Model Agent
oma.description: Target operating models, RACI matrices, AI governance frameworks, CoE design, AI lifecycle process. Output as .pptx.

dta.name: Data & Technology Agent
dta.description: IT landscape assessment, AI data readiness scorecard (5 dimensions), technology architecture direction. Directional only.

uxa.name: UX & Customer Experience Agent
uxa.description: Customer journey maps, AI opportunity mapping across automation/personalisation/prediction/assistance, UX requirements, responsible design.

sca.name: Stakeholder & Change Agent
sca.description: Stakeholder maps, change readiness assessment, Change Management Plan integrated with roadmap. Output as .pptx.

isa.name: Insight & Synthesis Agent
isa.description: Cross-domain insight crystallisation. Produces Strategic Insight Memo (max 8 points). Runs after all Tier 3+4 work is complete.

va.name: Visualisation Agent
va.description: Charts, diagrams, and infographics via Python (matplotlib/plotly) and Mermaid. Maintains Visual Asset Register (SVG/PNG).

da.name: Deck Agent
da.description: PowerPoint assembly specialist. Embeds Visual Asset Register assets; writes speaker notes; validates via LibreOffice pipeline.

dp.name: Document Production Agent
dp.description: Long-form presentation specialist. Full reports and exec summaries as .pptx using pptxgenjs. Formats approved narrative only.

pa.name: Planning Agent
pa.description: Engagement Gantt plan and fixed-fee budget model in Excel (openpyxl). Formula-driven; no hardcoded numbers. One-page Planning Summary.

km.name: Knowledge Manager
km.description: Steward of firm IP library. Semantic retrieval at engagement start; structured engagement summary logging at completion.

bd.name: Business Development Agent
bd.description: Proposal production engine. Fixed-fee pricing; agent configuration proposals; KM-grounded case studies; 15-page max.
